title: Card
description: One unified shape for everything in the Narrow Highway library. Notes, connections, walks, searches, community notes, and stacks are all cards distinguished by 'kind'. A card carries its content, its source with link-back, its place in the bookcase (shelf/box/bands), its connections to other cards, its lifecycle stage, and its quality signals. The library catalogs itself in this shape.

kind.description: Subtype. Determines which optional fields are meaningful.

body.description: The content of the card. Terse, index-card style. If long-form is needed, the body is a summary and the full text lives at source.url.

source.description: Where the claim came from. Every card must trace back to a source.

label.description: Human-readable origin, e.g. 'Westminster Shorter Catechism Q33' or 'Easton's Bible Dictionary'

url.description: URL or repo path back to the source

ref.description: Specific reference within the source, e.g. 'Rom 8:28-30' or 'p. 217'

authority_tier.description: Doctrinal source hierarchy. Tier 1 (Words in Red) is the most authoritative; engine_derived is the least.

shelf.description: Top-level library section: codex, almanac, apothecary, hymns, recipes, maker, curriculum, atlas, household, etc.

box.description: Sub-grouping within the shelf, e.g. 'Pauline epistles' within 'codex'

bands.description: Small free-form tags for tight clustering and search

connections.description: Back-of-card links. Each connection points to another card and names the relationship.

via_connection_card_id.description: If a dedicated connection-card explains this edge, its id lives here

source_hash.description: sha256 of (title + body + source.url + source.ref). Used for dedup and integrity.

visibility.description: Who can see this card. Quarantine = freshly created, not yet promoted anywhere.

shared_with.description: If visibility=shared, the list of household_ids that can see it

lifecycle_stage.description: Operational lifecycle. Operator approves the loud transitions.

metrics.description: Quality signals that drive promotion. Updated by the engine; not user-editable.

volatility.description: How long this card's claim is expected to hold. Permanent = doctrinal/scriptural; current = re-check before relying.

forked_from.description: If this card was forked from another, the parent card_id

extra.description: Subtype-specific fields. Schema enforcement happens at the API layer based on 'kind'.

narration.description: What Shepherd says when this card is surfaced

cards_surfaced.description: search: the card_ids that survived for this query

card_id_annotated.description: community_note: the card this note balances

votes_by_tradition.description: community_note: helpful_count per tradition (1689_baptist, presbyterian, etc.)

bridge_score.description: community_note: cross-tradition agreement; surfaces when > threshold

household_id.description: stack: the household this stack belongs to
